description_long: This object is a rectangular computer keyboard with a flat, slightly inclined profile and a standard, full-size layout. The top surface is populated with evenly spaced keys, likely made of plastic, and the body appears to be constructed from a durable plastic shell. The sides are thin, and the overall form is slim, suggesting a modern, low-profile design. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, and no brand logo is apparent on the surface. The color is uniformly black, giving it a sleek and professional appearance. The keyboard is in excellent condition, with no visible signs of wear, scratches, or discoloration.
description: A sleek, full-size black keyboard with a flat, modern profile and no visible branding or cables. The surface is smooth and the object appears new and well-maintained.
description_view_0: The front view shows the broad, flat face of the keyboard with the key area visible, highlighting its full-size rectangular shape.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the keyboard's slim, low-profile thickness and straight edges.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, showing the back edge of the keyboard with no visible ports or features.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again emphasizes the thinness and straight, uniform profile of the keyboard.
